name: a clean install target reports no conflicts without crashing under set -u
command:
fn=$(sed -n '/^detect_conflicts() {/,/^}/p' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/install.sh")
d=$(mktemp -d)
out=$(bash -uc "$fn"$'\n'"detect_conflicts \"$d\"" 2>&1)
rc=$?
rm -rf "$d"
[ "$rc" = 0 ] && [ -z "$out" ] && echo clean-no-crash 1>&2
